SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AARON GRUBER, PLAINTIFF SHOTSWELL ASSOCIATES IS PRESENT, APPEARING VIA ZOOM IS CHAYA WURMAN. DEFENDANT HELEN RAITER IS PRESENT APPEARING MID HEARING AT 9:00 AM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON GRUBER; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHOTSWELL ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAITER, HELEN $1,690.00 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,065.00, $1,090 (50% OF AMOUNT REQUESTED RE: PAINT) $600(50% OF AMOUNT REQUESTED RE: CABINET) $0 (BAD FAITH DAMAGES) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
